instruction: Where is the administrative office for graduate advising located?

instruction: Who should I contact regarding undergraduate programs in Computer Science?

instruction: Who is in charge of the Computer Science department?
context: Source: Computer Science Department Info Page, Category: Department Chair
response: The Department Chair of Computer Science is David Rosenblum.

instruction: Who manages undergraduate studies in the Computer Science department?
context: Source: Computer Science Department Info Page, Category: Undergraduate Studies Chair
response: The Associate Chairs for Undergraduate Studies are Shvetha Soundararajan and Mark Snyder.

instruction: Who is the Graduate Studies Chair in the Computer Science department?
context: Source: Computer Science Department Info Page, Category: Graduate Studies Chair

instruction: Who oversees the PhD program in Computer Science?

instruction: Who is responsible for the MS CS program?

instruction: Who is the Director of Inclusive Computing in the Computer Science department?

instruction: What are the instructions for required advising for CS 110?
context: course: CS 110, form_link: https://cs.gmu.edu/media/uploads/programs/undergraduate/files/advisingcs110.pdf
response: Meet with one of the Undergraduate Academic Advisors listed above.
Email the filled out CS 110 Advising Form at least 48 hours prior to the scheduled appointment.
Do not arrive at your appointment with your form in hand or on your laptop.

instruction: What are the instructions for required advising for CS 330?
context: course: CS 330, form_link: https://cs.gmu.edu/media/uploads/programs/undergraduate/files/advisingcs330.pdf

Bring the filled out CS 330 Advising Form to your faculty meeting.
